data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet for a controllable player character. Exactly 2 rows by 2 columns, exactly 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. No visible grid lines or borders. Solid flat chroma-key background #FF00FF only, no gradient, no texture, no floor, no shadow.

Character: same Samsara Ascension cute chibi jade-white female xianxia cultivator identity; 2.5 to 3 heads tall; large soft expressive head; long dark ink hair; simple jade hair ornament; small forehead gem; white and pale-jade robes; soft teal ribbons; light gold trim; short jade sword held close to the body; clean HD hand-painted chibi fantasy RPG asset; rounded readable silhouette; simplified details; not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art.

Action: walk. Four frames must show real pose changes, not camera movement or scaling. Frame order left-to-right, top row then bottom row: 
1) top-left: right foot forward, left foot back, body leaning slightly forward, sword balanced close to body.
2) top-right: passing step, both feet near center, body rises, arms counter-swing, ribbons trail backward.
3) bottom-left: left foot forward, right foot back, body weight clearly shifted, robe opens with the stride.
4) bottom-right: passing step returning to neutral, body lowers slightly, arms counter-swing opposite, loop reads as walking.

View and framing: full body visible, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, feet/bottom anchor line stable in every cell, character centered in each cell, same body height and same pixel scale in every frame, subject fills around 55 to 60 percent of each cell, generous margin on all sides. Preserve exact same character identity, costume colors, face/eyes, hair ornament, robe palette, sword design, and material language in every cell; only body pose, clothing motion, hair/ribbon motion, and compact attached qi accent may change. Containment: entire character, sword, hair, sleeves, ribbons, robe hem, and any tiny attached aura fully inside each cell; nothing crosses cell edges; no floating detached effects outside the main silhouette; no projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no dust cloud.

Style: clean HD hand-painted sprite sheet for fantasy RPG, crisp readable silhouette, consistent lighting, no text, no labels, no UI, no watermark, no extra characters, no cropped feet, no inconsistent scale, no redesigned outfit, no alternate character.
